project.name: argouml-zh
project.description:
Chinese localization for ArgoUML. Sources vendored from https://github.com/argouml-tigris-org/argouml-i18n-zh (last upstream commit 89ec572, 2022-08-21). .properties files are encoded as UTF-8; legacy \uXXXX escapes are accepted and decoded by Java regardless of file encoding, so existing translation files remain valid.
Drop this JAR on ArgoUML's classpath and start with -Duser.language=zh -Duser.country=CN to enable Simplified Chinese; use -Duser.country=TW for Traditional Chinese. Missing keys fall back to English automatically.
